description: Build source-attributed vehicle safety dossiers, honest comparisons, and recall-change reports from NHTSA data.

tools.name: complaints_list-by-vehicle
tools.description: List owner complaints for a model year, make, and model. Required: make, model, modelYear. Returns array of Complaint.

tools.name: products_list-vehicle-makes
tools.description: List makes for a model year and issue type. Required: modelYear, issueType. Returns the ProductsListVehicleMakesResponse.

params.name: issueType
params.description: r for recalls, c for complaints/communications, i for investigations when supported

tools.name: products_list-vehicle-model-years
tools.description: List vehicle model years for an issue type. Required: issueType. Returns the ProductsListVehicleModelYearsResponse.

params.name: issueType
params.description: r for recalls, c for complaints/communications, i for investigations when supported

tools.name: products_list-vehicle-models
tools.description: List models for a make, model year, and issue type. Required: modelYear, make, issueType. Returns the ProductsListVehicleModelsResponse.

params.name: issueType
params.description: r for recalls, c for complaints/communications, i for investigations when supported

tools.name: recalls_get-campaign
tools.description: Get a recall by NHTSA campaign number. Required: campaignNumber. Returns array of Recall.

tools.name: recalls_list-by-vehicle
tools.description: List recalls for a model year, make, and model. Required: make, model, modelYear. Returns array of Recall.

tools.name: safety-ratings_get
tools.description: Get crash ratings for a NHTSA vehicle ID. Required: vehicleId. Optional: format (default: json). Returns the SafetyRatingsGetResponse.

tools.name: safety-ratings_list-by-vehicle
tools.description: List crash-rating vehicle variants. Required: modelYear, make, model. Optional: format (default: json). Returns the SafetyRatingsListByVehicleResponse.

tools.name: vehicles_decode-vin
tools.description: Decode a VIN into normalized vehicle attributes. Required: vin. Optional: modelyear, format (default: json). Returns the VehiclesDecodeVinResponse.
